name: cpig-ab-r2
description: R2.1 + R2.4-pre Tier-2 A/B capture suite for the CPig.Core split (MultiVerse/prompts/r2-cpig-core-split-2026-07-03.md sections 1.3 + 4). TWO tests, each pushing a scene through the managed export chain; the artifact of record is each push's %TEMP%/CPig/RhinoDisplay/display.3mf overwrite, NOT pixels: (1) cpig-ab-r2-capture - 3-field scene (sphere + box + gyroid) plus a _Move (the R2.1/R2.2/R2.3 gate fixture, archives tier2-a/tier2-b); (2) cpig-ab-r2-relocate - the RecipeBuilder.Relocate paths (_CPigCopy recipe relocation + moved-operand boolean relocation folded into a single-leaf libfive union), captured BEFORE R2.4 moves RecipeBuilder to CPig.Core.Recipes (archives tier2-relocate-a/tier2-relocate-b). HOW TO RUN (A-side, pre-refactor, and again B-side, post-refactor): 1) start the archiver FIRST with the archive dir matching the test you are capturing: python C:/Repos/CPig/scripts/ab_archive_watcher.py --out C:/Repos/CPig/tests/ab-r2/tier2-a (tier2-b B-side; tier2-relocate-a / tier2-relocate-b for the relocate test); 2) canary run --workload rhino --test <one test> (run tests INDIVIDUALLY when capturing - one watcher archive dir per test keeps the per-artifact A/B index alignment per-fixture; a whole-suite run would interleave both tests' pushes into one dir); 3) Ctrl+C the archiver after the run; 4) RECONCILE before comparing (mandatory - the archiver is a 0.25s poller, so a missed overwrite would otherwise be a SILENT hole that shifts the per-artifact A/B index alignment): python C:/Repos/CPig/scripts/ab_reconcile_archive.py --archive C:/Repos/CPig/tests/ab-r2/tier2-a - asserts every cpig.push.done (mode=3mf) contentSha256 in the Penumbra NDJSON telemetry (%LOCALAPPDATA%/Penumbra/preview/telemetry.ndjson - run it BEFORE the next Rhino spawn archives that file to history/) has a matching archived file; nonzero exit = the capture run is invalid, re-run it; 5) compare sides per-artifact with python C:/Repos/CPig/scripts/hash_3mf_parts.py (per-part SHA256, p:UUID stripped from 3D/3dmodel.model only - whole-file SHA256 is NOT an equality oracle, lib3mf 2.5.0 rewrites p:UUIDs every export). Push identity: cpig.push.done seq + contentSha256 (SHA256 of the display.3mf bytes, the same hash the archiver names files with). Pre-flight: libpng16.dll must be in the deployed native set (%AppData%/Grasshopper/Libraries has it as of 2026-07-03; CPig/build/native/win-x64 staging does NOT).
